The '''Culu Memorial Center''' was a [[Jedi academy]] on [[Alpheridies/Legends|Alpheridies]], established sometime after the [[Great Sith War/Legends|Great Sith War]].

==History==
During the [[Great Sith War/Legends|Great Sith War]], the [[Mandalorian Crusaders]] launched an assault on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] of [[Alpheridies/Legends|Alpheridies]] and were able to conquer it.<ref name="TEA">''[[The Essential Atlas]]''</ref> Eventually, the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] was able to drive the [[Mandalorian/Legends|Mandalorians]] from the world and the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]] established the Culu Memorial Center on the world in order to train the [[Force-sensitive/Legends|Force-sensitive]] inhabitants. It was presumably named after [[Shoaneb Culu]], a [[Miraluka/Legends|Miraluka]] [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Battle of Kemplex Nine|killed]] during the Great Sith War, who had wanted to build a Jedi Academy on her [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]].<ref name="JJM">{{Faraway|url=ComicsbyJJM/StarWarsKOTORHandbook/StarWarsKOTORHandbook/tabid/152/Default.aspx|text=Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic Handbook #1}}</ref>

Several Jedi of this era came from Alpheridies, including [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Masters]] [[Q'Anilia]] and [[Noab Hulis]].<ref name="KOTORHB">''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic Handbook]]''</ref> Despite the Jedi presence however, the world fell into territory held by the [[Darth Revan's Sith Empire|Sith Empire]] during the [[Jedi Civil War]] and remained within contested [[Realspace/Legends|space]] until the defeat of the Sith during the [[New Sith Wars]].<ref name="TEA" /> Following the [[Ruusan Reformations/Legends|Ruusan Reformation]], the academy was renowned for its deep studies of [[The Force/Legends|the Force]], and held promise for those who hoped to follow the path of the [[Jedi Seer]].

According to [[Palpatine/Legends|Darth Sidious's]] notes in his stolen copy of [[The Jedi Path: A Manual for Students of the Force]], the Alpheridies academy was one of many that he had destroyed during the [[Great Jedi Purge/Legends|Great Jedi Purge]]. He remarked that the book itself revealed the academy's supposedly hidden location, saving the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] time as they hunted Jedi.<ref name="TJP" />
